meta.title: Marvel Cinematic Universe — Complete Database
meta.description: The definitive, comprehensive database of the Marvel Cinematic Universe (MCU), covering every film, Disney+ series, special presentation, and officially announced upcoming project. Includes full cast data, release timelines, in-universe chronological order, streaming availability, and external links.

about.description_long: The Marvel Cinematic Universe (MCU) is an American media franchise and shared universe centered on a series of superhero films produced by Marvel Studios. The franchise also includes television series, short films, digital series, and literature. The shared universe, much like the original Marvel Comics universe, was established by crossing over common plot elements, settings, cast, and characters. Marvel Studios releases its films in groups called 'Phases'. The first three phases are collectively known as 'The Infinity Saga', and the following phases are known as 'The Multiverse Saga'.

sagas.name: The Infinity Saga
sagas.description: The story of the Infinity Stones and Thanos's quest to collect them, culminating in Avengers: Endgame.

sagas.name: The Multiverse Saga
sagas.description: The exploration of the multiverse following the Blip, introducing variants, alternate timelines, and new threats.

watch_order_types.name: Release Order
watch_order_types.description: Watch the MCU in the order the films and shows were released to the public. Recommended for first-time viewers.

watch_order_types.name: In-Universe Chronological Order
watch_order_types.description: Watch the MCU in the order events happen within the Marvel universe timeline. Recommended for re-watches.
